raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sargi tu fcho Wihru / fa tas
fuddin fuddihs/ tad buhs tawa
Dwehfeles winna Dwehfeles
Weeta/ jeb tew buhs weenu Ta-
lentu Sudraba doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tawain Kalpam
fchurp un turp bij jadarra / tad
tas fudde. Tad fazzija tas I-
fraêta Kehniisch : Scht irr tawa
Teefa/ ko tu pats fev efi neffis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad steidsehs wiꞥſch/ un
nozebine tohs Pelnus no farwa
Waiga/ un tas Israëla Kehniisch
pasinne to/ ka tas weens no teem
Praweescheem btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us to :
Ta fakka tas KURGS : Ta-
pehz ka tu fcho Wihru/ fo es liê-
ku isdeldeht/ no Rohkas effi at-
laidis/ tad buhs tawa Dwehfele
winna Dwehfeles Weeta/ un
tarvi Landis winna Lauschu
Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Israëta Kehniisch
nogahje skunnigs un duftnigs
fawa Nammâ/ un nahze uhs
Samariju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXI. Nodalla.
Nabbats/ kad wiꞥſch tam Kehnimam Akabam
fawu Wihna-Dahrsu/ ka fawo Tehwo Man-
tu bij aisleeđis : 1/ 3. Tohp us Jsebetes
Skubbinaſchanu nokants : 7/ 13. Tapehz
Elijas tik labbi Jsebelei/ ka Akabam bref-
migas Sohdibas paſluddina : 17. Akabs
pasemmojahe preekich Deewa/ un dabbu
Sohdibas Atlaiſchanu : 27.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pehz fchahin Leetahm
tas notiffahs / ka Nah-
batam tam Jesreëliteram
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "weenâ Wihna-Dahrs bija Jeſ-
eła/ fahnis Akaba ta Kehni-
no Samartjas Pilli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akabs runnaja ar No-
batu/ fazzidans: Dohd man
wu Wihna-Dahrsu/ es dar
fchohs few no ta weenu Sah-
Dahrsu/ tapehz ka tas tuwu
mannu Namnta irr/ un es do-
fehu tew preekſch winna wee-
labbaku Wihna-Dahrsu / ne
wiꞥſch irr / ja tas tew patih-
jeb es tew dohſchn Nandu/ ze-
tas makfa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Nabbats fazzija
Akabu: Lat tas KUNGS ma-
no ta pafarga/ ka es tew nan-
Tehwo Mantu buhtn dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze Akabs ſkummi
Mahjäs ta Wahrdä deht /
Nabbats tas Jesreëliteris us
bij runnajs/ un fazzijs: Es te-
manno Tehwo Mantu ne do-
tchu. Un wiꞥſch apguillehs
farvu Gultu/ un apgreese far-
Waign/ un ne ehde Matsi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze Jsebele wiꞥ-
Seewa pee ta/ un runnaja ar t-
Ras tas irr/ ka taws Prahts
skunnigs irr / un ka tu Ma-
ne ehd ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us te-
Tapehz ka es ar Nabbatu to Je-
reëliteri efmu runnajs / un us
fazzifs: Dohd man tawu Wi-
na-Dahrsu par Nandu/ jeb ja-
gribbi/ dohſchn es tew wee-
zittu Wihna-Dahrsu preekſch te-
Bet tas fazzija : Es tew ne do-
ſchu mannu Wihna-Dahrsu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
